name: Nurnberger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix honey, sugar, eggbeater, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind.
2. Blend in the dry ingredients: flour, cinnamon, and baking soda.
3. Chill the dough overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Roll out small amounts of dough until it is about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds using a cookie cutter or knife.
7. Place the cookies on a nonstick baking sheet, and optionally place a slivered almond in the center of each one.
8. Bake for the appropriate amount of time until set.
9. Immediately brush with glazing icing.
10. Prepare the icing by boiling 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup water until it reaches a thread consistency (230 degrees Fahrenheit).
11. Remove from heat and stir in 1/4 cup powdered sugar. Brush lightly over the cooled cookies.
12. If the icing becomes sugary, reheat slightly and add a little water to restore clarity before brushing again.
